math · stats

Sample post — replace this title

07 July 2026

This is a template for a new article. Create a new file in _posts/ with the naming convention YYYY-MM-DD-title.md and it will appear automatically on the writing page.

Inline math works like this: the identity $e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0$ links five constants in one equation. Block-level equations work with double dollar signs:

$$ \sum_{i=1}^{n} i = \frac{n(n+1)}{2} $$

A section heading

Use ## for section breaks within a post, and regular paragraphs for the body text. Keep one idea per paragraph where you can — it reads better on the web than dense academic blocks.

Use a blockquote like this for a pull quote, a definition worth calling out, or a quoted result from a paper.

Let's talk mathematics — or lessons.

Open to tutoring, mentoring, and conversations about olympiad problems, analysis, or anything in between.
